title: Live Peer Development
expectation: Follow the development-process blueprint through relevant blueprint updates, worker-backed feature-branch setup, local implementation and verification, committed milestone updates, and live worker preview sharing with the user. Keep the work on the feature branch with a working worker dashboard preview URL, expect continued user feedback while the preview is live, and stop before merge, release promotion, runtime deploy, and manager-host live validation unless the user explicitly switches to Full Development Process.
idlePrompt: If the current live peer development milestone is complete, reply only with 'done: live peer development complete'. If you are truly blocked on a user or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: live peer development blocked'. Otherwise resume the work immediately and perform the next required blueprint, implementation, verification, commit, preview, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on user or environment dependency
